summary: Recent B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering graduate with hands‑on experience in emulation, UART protocol development, and HW/SW co‑verification gained through internships at Synopsys, Nvidia, and Jabil. Skilled in creating UART transactors for Zebu emulators using C++, enhancing protocol functionality, and building HW/SW testbench agents. Strong foundation in Verilog/SystemVerilog, C/C++, Perl, Python, and static timing analysis, seeking to contribute as an Emulation Engineer.

experience.title: Technical Engineer Apprentice
bullets: Developed a UART transactor for the Zebu emulator using C++.
Enhanced protocol functionality for Zebu transactors using C++.
Developed HW/SW testbench backwards compatibility agent and script for Zebu transactors, incorporating AI-based code review.

experience.title: ASIC Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Achieved timing closure and performance optimization for advanced SoC designs using Static Timing Analysis (STA).
Created Perl scripts to automate STA report analysis.
Performed manual fixes for clock transition and crosstalk violations.

experience.company: Jabil Circuit India Private Limited Pune
experience.title: Test Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Performed working, debugging, and testing of Ericsson’s 5G radio transceiver (AIR3268).

projects.name: Development and Implementation of a 5G Modem using an FPGA Board
bullets: Implemented FM broadcast and radio using Adalm-Pluto SDR.
Conducted hardware-in-the-loop simulation of FFT on Kintex-7 KC705 FPGA development board.
Developed Simulink models and FPGA implementation of a 5G transceiver using Vitis Model Composer.

projects.name: Robosoccer Bot
bullets: Built an RC-controlled robot with a laser-cut metal chassis, Sabertooth motor driver, and geared motors.

projects.name: Test Data Compression for System-on-a-Chip Using Huffman Codes April 2024
bullets: Implemented Huffman coding for data compression using Xilinx Vivado.

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
bullets: Worked on a smart irrigation system for flood-irrigated paddy fields using IoT-based systems as group leader.
Used ESP-32 microcontroller, nRF24L01 RF module, GSM SIM800A, and BME280 & Thingspeak IoT Cloud.
Worked on water conservation by automating water flow and alerting the farmer about the weather.

education.institution: THAPAR INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY Patiala
